'''Latoma''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Latoma system/Legends|Latoma system]] in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was a small rocky planetoid and covered in impact craters. The planet was used by [[Byro Ti'mere]] to distract visitors and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] searching for his secret base on [[Brugga]]. Ti'mere established the ruins of an outpost on the planet to throw off suspicions that he was still operating out of the Latoma system and convince them he had moved elsewhere.<ref name="FBS" />
